text.p: Greetings to you and the family in the name of our risen Lord and Saviour Jesus Christ. I trust all is well with you. Ihave been out of contact with you because my phone got lost along with all the numbers on it.

I'd like to come down to for your scheduled meeting towards the hosting of the regional rally. I assume it still takes place on the last sundays of the month at Hotel. Please advise me on other details particularly wi regards to time. Let me know your GSM number via text to my line .
